headline: Hershey taps PepsiCo executive for US president role
summary: Heather Hoytink will join the US-based confectionery and salty snacks group in July.

headline: Micron To Rally More Than 57%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Top analysts changed outlook on top names. See full changes, upgrades, downgrades on analyst ratings page. See how analysts view PepsiCo, Absci, Okta, Datadog, ICON, Nike, UWM, Micron.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Hershey, Lowers Price Target to $200
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Peter Galbo   maintains Hershey (NYSE:HSY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $220 to $200.
